firmwares.name: esp32-16mb
firmwares.description: ESP32 classic with 16 MB flash — WiFi only. Same silicon as `esp32`; the 4 MB binary runs on these boards too, this variant just uses the extra flash for bigger OTA slots + filesystem (Serg boards, QuinLED Dig-Octa).

firmwares.name: esp32-eth
firmwares.description: ESP32 classic — Ethernet only (Olimex pins, WiFi compiled out)

firmwares.name: esp32s3-n16r8
firmwares.description: ESP32-S3 DevKitC-1 (N16R8: 16 MB flash, 8 MB octal PSRAM) — WiFi only

firmwares.name: esp32s3-n8r8
firmwares.description: ESP32-S3 (N8R8: 8 MB flash, 8 MB octal PSRAM) — WiFi only. Half the flash of N16R8; the N16R8 binary overruns an 8 MB board, so N8R8 boards (LightCrafter etc.) need this variant.

firmwares.name: esp32p4-eth
firmwares.description: Waveshare ESP32-P4-NANO — Ethernet only (IP101 PHY). The WiFi-less fallback; esp32p4-eth-wifi adds the C6 radio.

firmwares.name: esp32p4-eth-wifi
firmwares.description: Waveshare ESP32-P4-NANO — Ethernet + WiFi. WiFi runs on the on-board ESP32-C6 over SDIO (esp_wifi_remote + esp_hosted, pulled P4-only). First build is longer (managed components).
